summary: Implemented deterministic M4 automatic field engagement resolution and the minimal siege choice loop through shared GameCommand paths. Added explicit M4 field engagement and siege state, serializable command events, siege-state query support, protocol schema parsing, and focused scenario/property coverage. Task status is REVIEW and route_to is systems_architect.

tests_run.result: Modified protocol, sim-core, task JSON, protocol test; new tests/sim-core-m4-auto-engagement-siege.test.ts; new REVIEW handoff JSON in project/messages/outbox.
Node and Worker-compatible hashes matched for hello, command/query, and save/load canaries.
Architecture boundaries passed; determinism passed; 31 root test files/210 tests passed; web package 1 file/3 tests passed.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON parse/shape check for M4-AUTO-ENGAGEMENT-SIEGE-001
tests_run.result: JSON OK; task status REVIEW and route_to systems_architect.

tests_run.command: node -e handoff JSON parse/schema shape check
tests_run.result: HANDOFF JSON OK; status REVIEW and route_to systems_architect.

decisions: Field engagements resolve from explicit command inputs: engagement id, campaign plan, march, defender polity, defender estimated troops, defender fortification, and reason codes.
Siege choices are limited to invest/blockade, assault, continue, accept-surrender, lift-siege, and withdraw, all through sim.apply-m4-siege-choice for player and AI parity.
Surrender readiness is represented by explicit siege fields and reason codes tied to defender supply, force ratio, fortification progress, assault breach, and time invested.
No manual node battle, tactical UI, 3D battle, diplomacy, peace treaty, multiplayer/server, client UI, save-format, or content changes were made.
risks: Risk level remains R3 because protocol and authoritative simulation surfaces changed; systems_architect review is requested.
New M4 combat state is authoritative sim-core state only. Save-format persistence for these new arrays is intentionally not implemented in this task because save-format is forbidden/out of scope.
requested_action: Review deterministic M4 field engagement and siege command/state/event/query implementation for architecture acceptance. Do not mark ACCEPTED/CLOSED until reviewer approval.
